name: Living Replicator Specs

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Living Replicator Specs Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Mail 726 Armor +14 Stamina +38 Intellect Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +9 Healing and +3 Spell Damage Durability 85 / 85 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Increases healing done by up to 106 and damage done by up to 36 for all magical spells and effects. Equip: Restores 9 mana per 5 sec. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance. (3 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 5 81 49 This epic mail armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot. It is crafted. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
